data.text:
Committed. Changes:

- `NavShell.svelte`: added "Overview" sidebar entry (Home icon) routing to project home, with exact-match active state. DDx brand is now an anchor — routes to project home when a project is selected, else `/`.
- `navigation.spec.ts`: added TC-008 covering both paths (sidebar Overview from `/beads`, brand click from `/sessions`).

Verified with `bun run check` (0 errors) and Playwright — TC-008 passes; the 3 pre-existing failures (TC-002/006/007) fail identically on the base revision, so they're not regressions from this change.
